summary: Completed comprehensive testing of sport booking system modifications. Tested homepage layout (max 3 sports), mobile header hamburger menu, admin layout, and guest booking auto-login flow.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile sidebar does not auto-close on navigation in admin panel

passed_tests: Backend API - Guest booking returns token and generated_password for new users
Backend API - Sports and Events APIs working
Frontend - Homepage shows max 3 sports in a row on desktop
Frontend - Mobile header has hamburger menu button
Frontend - Admin desktop layout with sidebar on left and proper content margin (lg:ml-64)
Frontend - Guest booking auto-login flow works perfectly
Frontend - Password modal appears for new users
Frontend - Auto-redirect to my bookings after guest booking
Frontend - Mobile sport grid shows appropriate layout (1-2 columns)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin mobile sidebar auto-close functionality - sidebar should close when navigating to different admin sections on mobile devices
